items.expected_intent: Greet the customer to start the call
items.retrieval_query: greet customer politely, say hello, good morning, good afternoon

items.expected_agent_utterance: I am _____ from adventure team on Mahindra & Mahindra.
items.retrieval_query: introduce yourself and your team, say who you are and your team
items.source_quote: I am _____ from adventure team on Mahindra & Mahindra.

items.item_text: Explain the purpose and duration of the survey
items.expected_agent_utterance: We are conducting a short feedback exercise to understand customer preferences for Adventure experiences. This will help us improve future events. The call will take about 8–10 minutes. Your responses will be kept confidential and used only for analysis purposes.
items.retrieval_query: explain survey purpose, mention feedback, call duration, confidentiality
items.source_quote: We are conducting a short feedback exercise to understand customer preferences for Adventure experiences. This will help us improve future events. The call will take about 8–10 minutes. Your responses will be kept confidential and used only for analysis purposes.

items.expected_agent_utterance: Sir/Mam, we would start with your basic info, Age, Profession, How many people are there in your family, Which vehicle/vehicles do you own?
items.retrieval_query: ask for basic info like age, profession, family size, vehicle ownership
items.source_quote: Sir/Mam, we would start with your basic info, Age Profession How many people are there in your family Which vehicle/vehicles do you own?

items.item_text: Ask how the customer first came across the adventure event
items.expected_agent_utterance: How did you first come across the Mahindra Adventure event?
items.expected_intent: Identify source of awareness for the event
items.retrieval_query: ask how customer first heard about the adventure event
items.source_quote: How did you first come across the Mahindra Adventure event?

items.item_text: Ask what part of the event caught the customer's interest initially
items.expected_agent_utterance: What part of the event caught your interest initially?
items.expected_intent: Understand initial attraction to the event
items.retrieval_query: ask what initially interested you in the event
items.source_quote: What part of the event caught your interest initially?

items.item_text: Ask what stopped the customer from subscribing to the event
items.expected_agent_utterance: What stopped you from finally subscribing to the event?
items.retrieval_query: ask what stopped you from subscribing to the event
items.source_quote: What stopped you from finally subscribing to the event?

items.item_text: Ask if the customer was looking for any other outdoor experiences
items.expected_agent_utterance: Were you also looking for any other outdoor experiences? (Yes/No)
items.expected_intent: Determine interest in other outdoor experiences
items.retrieval_query: ask if you were looking for other outdoor experiences
items.source_quote: Were you also looking for any other outdoor experiences? (Yes/No)

items.item_text: Ask which other outdoor experiences the customer looked at
items.expected_agent_utterance: If yes, which ones did you look at?
items.expected_intent: Collect details of other outdoor experiences considered
items.retrieval_query: ask which other outdoor experiences you considered
items.condition_text: Ask only if customer answered Yes to looking for other outdoor experiences
items.condition_source_item_hint: Were you also looking for any other outdoor experiences? (Yes/No)
items.source_quote: If yes, which ones did you look at?

items.item_text: Ask where the customer heard about these other outdoor experiences
items.expected_agent_utterance: And where did you hear about these other outdoor experiences?
items.expected_intent: Identify source of awareness for other outdoor experiences
items.retrieval_query: ask where you heard about those other outdoor experiences
items.condition_text: Ask only if customer answered Yes to looking for other outdoor experiences
items.condition_source_item_hint: Were you also looking for any other outdoor experiences? (Yes/No)
items.source_quote: And where did you hear about these other outdoor experiences?

items.item_text: Ask what one thing could be improved to make the customer consider subscribing
items.expected_agent_utterance: What is the one thing we could improve that would make you consider subscribing in the future?
items.expected_intent: Collect suggestions for improvement to increase subscription
items.retrieval_query: ask what one thing we could improve to make you subscribe
items.source_quote: What is the one thing we could improve that would make you consider subscribing in the future?
